## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Architecture diagram / ADR
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)

## Checklist

- [ ] The change does not expose sensitive information (no secrets, no PII, no confidential business rules).
- [ ] Diagrams and examples remain generic and anonymized.
- [ ] All Mermaid diagrams render correctly (preview in VS Code or GitHub).
- [ ] Related ADR created or updated if this is an architectural decision.
- [ ] `docs/roadmap.md` updated if a roadmap item is completed.
- [ ] Self-reviewed before requesting review.
